ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company in billions */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the market data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the stock on that date */,
  "trading_range" REAL /* Trading range of the stock on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was created */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of trading strategy (e.g., momentum-based, mean-reversion-based) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the strategy (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, cancelled) */,
  "trade_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, trade executed) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "activity_category" TEXT /* Category of the activity (e.g., trading, analytics) */,
  "activity_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the activity (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the real-time market data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the real-time market data */,
  "price" REAL /* Real-time price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical dataset */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the historical dataset */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the historical dataset */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the historical dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_datasets_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtesting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtesting result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy associated with the backtesting result */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtesting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtesting period */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the trading strategy (e.g., returns, volatility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtesting_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the analytics report (e.g., market trends, trading insights) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
